channel.title: Tutorials, thoughts, and other unsolicited writings on Patrick Durkee lose
channel.description: Recent content in Tutorials, thoughts, and other unsolicited writings on Patrick Durkee lose

item.title: satRdays: an introduction
item.description: I’m planning to make a (semi-)weekly habit of learning a new thing in R (e.g., a function, an analysis, a feature) and writing a breif overview/tutorial of it. This will be the first of the series. The main motivation for starting this series is to contribute to the community that helped me—and continues to help me—learn R. Great resources for learning R are already scattered across the internet, but I figure one more voice couldn’t hurt.

item.title: Hello, world?
item.description: I’ve never blogged before nor have I had any strong inclinations to do so, but I recently convinced myself it might be a “fun” way to spend some of my free time while still bettering myself academically. So, I made this website and I’m going to give academic-blogging a go. I’m not entirely sure what I’ll blog about, but I have some general ideas. My main goals for this blog include writing R tutorials, summarizing interesting articles, and reporting results of casual research studies I conduct (e.
